历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated around 30664 → 30916 → 28395 → 28051 → 31329, overall within the 28,000–31,000 range. The 2025 baseline is approximately 31329, shifting backward by about 3278 positions compared to 2024, showing a volatile trend over the past five years. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 40 in 2021 → 49 in 2022 → 46 in 2023 → 54 in 2024 → 70 in 2025 → 114 in 2026, with a significant expansion of about 63% in 2026 compared to 2025, notably easing competition pressure.\ n211 Project and Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking around 131st in 2026, fluctuating between 127–136 in recent years, overall stable.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The university was not included in reputation data from 2021 to 2026, with no significant positive or negative public opinion; Douyin heat total ranking 72nd, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure; no historical abnormal admission data, indicating no significant psychological disturbance in applications; no A- or above disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, with overall discipline strength mainly at B level, limited appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social heat. Xinjiang University offers Computer Science, Software Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, etc., matching popular directions. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees in the province in 2026 is about 203,600, an increase of about 6% from 192,100 in 2025, expanding the competition base. Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, Xinjiang, far from Fujian, and regional preferences have a certain inhibitory effect on Fujian candidates' willingness to apply. Combining the backward trend of 2025 rankings, the significant expansion of about 63% in Physics Category in 2026, and the increase of about 6% in provincial examinees, the expansion's effect on pushing back rankings (increasing ranking number) is significantly stronger than the intensified competition from increased examinees. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be notably further back compared to 2025; predicted minimum ranking approximately 43200, range 42700–43700.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 42700–43700, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., below 42700), you can focus on applying for popular majors like Computer Science and Technology and Information Security. If your ranking is near or above the upper limit, it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 5097 → 4709 → 3871 → 4077 → 5010. It reached its lowest point of 3871 in 2023 and then rebounded. The baseline for 2025 is about 5010, showing a V-shaped trend of first decreasing and then increasing over the past three years. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 2 in 2021 → 3 in 2022 → 4 in 2023 → 5 in 2024 → 5 in 2025 → 13 in 2026. Compared to 2025, the 2026 plan expands significantly by 160%, greatly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 131st, with stable rankings in recent years. The school has not been included in reputation data from 2021 to 2026, with no significant positive or negative public opinion. Its Douyin heat ranking is 72nd, with a rating of 'average'. It has not appeared in abnormal historical admission data, so there is no significant psychological disturbance in applications. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has no A- or above disciplines, with overall discipline strength mainly at the B level, limiting its appeal to high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Chinese Language and Literature and English are socially popular (Chinese Language/Literature recommended), while Law has divided and wait-and-see popularity. The estimated number of History Category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 64,300, an increase of about 6.6% from 60,300 in 2025, expanding the competition base. Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, Xinjiang, far from Fujian, and geographical preferences have a certain inhibitory effect on Fujian candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound of the 2025 ranking to 5010, the significant 160% expansion of History Category enrollment in 2026, and the approximately 6.6% increase in provincial candidates, the effect of enrollment expansion in pushing back the ranking (increasing the ranking number) is extremely significant, far outweighing the intensified competition from the increase in candidates. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be substantially lower than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 9850, with a range of 9350–10350.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., below 9350), focus on reaching for Chinese Language and Literature. If the ranking is near or above the upper limit, prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
